G1722.definition: in, on, among; a primary preposition denoting position (and instrumentality), i.e. a relation of rest.

G746.definition: beginning, origin; the first cause; also rule, authority, magistracy.

G1510.definition: I am, exist; the first person singular present indicative; a prolonged form of a primary verb.

G3588.definition: the definite article; the, this, that, who, which.

G3056.definition: a word, speech, divine utterance, reason; the Word (a title of Christ, John 1:1).

G2532.definition: and, also, even, both, then, so; a primary copulative particle.

G4314.definition: to, towards, with; a preposition of direction; with the accusative, motion or relation toward.

G2316.definition: God, a god; the supreme Divinity; figuratively a magistrate.

G3778.definition: this, this one, he; a demonstrative pronoun.

G3956.definition: all, every, the whole; including all the forms of declension.

G1223.definition: through, on account of, by means of; a primary preposition denoting the channel of an act.

G846.definition: he, she, it, they, them, same; the reflexive pronoun self, used of the third person.

G1096.definition: to become, come into being, happen, be made; a prolongation and middle voice form of a primary verb.

G5565.definition: without, apart from, separately; adverb from chora (a space).

G3761.definition: and not, neither, not even, nor; from ou and de.

G1520.definition: one; a primary numeral; emphatically, a single (one).

G3739.definition: who, which, that, what; the relative pronoun.

G2222.definition: life, both physical and spiritual; from zao (to live).

G5457.definition: light; from an obsolete phao (to shine); luminousness, figuratively of truth and its knowledge.

G444.definition: a human being, man, mankind; man-faced, i.e. a human being.

G4653.definition: darkness; figuratively, spiritual darkness or ignorance; from skotos.

G5316.definition: to shine, appear, become visible; to lighten (shine).

G3756.definition: not, no; the absolute negative adverb; expressing direct and full negation.

G2638.definition: to seize, lay hold of, grasp, comprehend, overcome; from kata and lambano.

H7225.definition: beginning, first, chief; the first, in place, time, order or rank.

H1254.definition: to create, shape, form; (absolutely) to create, used of divine activity.

H430.definition: God, gods, rulers, judges; plural of eloah; the supreme God.

H853.definition: the definite direct-object marker (untranslated); properly self, used to point to a definite object.

H8064.definition: heaven, heavens, sky; the sky as aloft; the visible arch in which the clouds move.

H776.definition: earth, land, ground, country; the whole earth, or a particular land.

H1961.definition: to be, become, come to pass, exist; to exist, i.e. be or become.

H8414.definition: formlessness, confusion, emptiness, waste; a desolation (of surface), i.e. desert.

H922.definition: emptiness, void; a vacuity, i.e. (superficially) an undistinguishable ruin.

H2822.definition: darkness, obscurity; figuratively misery, destruction, sorrow, ignorance.

H5921.definition: upon, above, over, on; properly the same as a primitive preposition meaning above, in all senses.

H6440.definition: face, faces, presence; (as the part that turns) the face; surface.

H8415.definition: deep, sea, abyss; an abyss (as a surging mass of water), especially the deep (the main sea).

H7307.definition: spirit, wind, breath; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; the Spirit (of God).

H7363.definition: to grow soft, relax; to brood, hover, flutter (as a bird over its young).

H4325.definition: water, waters; (dual of a primitive noun) water; figuratively juice.

H559.definition: to say, speak, utter, command; a primitive root.

H216.definition: light, daylight, dawn; illumination or (concretely) luminary (in every sense, including lightning, happiness, etc.).
